title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Lupin Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Lupin Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Lupin Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Bengaluru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lupin Asia Pacific Associates:
Lupin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin Asia Pacific Associates!
